title: Tournai, Hainaut — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tournai, Hainaut: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tournai is a city in Hainaut with a population of 69,000. One of Belgium’s oldest cities, known for its magnificent five-towered Romanesque cathedral, medieval bridge, and tapestry heritage.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
